sections.paragraph:
ϰαρποφορέω [καρποφόρος]

—1. ‘be active in producing the product of a growing process’, bear fruit of ground in various stages of generating grain Mk 4:28.

—2. in imagery of plant productivity in ref. to the moral/spiritual sphere bear fruit Mt 13:23; Mk 4:20; Lk 8:15; Ro 7:4f; Col 1:10.
